prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约8252→5309→4097→2728→3049，整体呈显著前移趋势（位次数字减小），2024年达到峰值2728后2025年小幅后移至3049， 近2年波动约321名；2025年基准约3049名；该校在安徽省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为42、42、43、43、43人，2026年计划增至49人，较2025年扩 招约14%，为近年最大增幅，扩招将导致竞争略有缓和，位次数字可能后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第3名（2021– 2026），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端与校园安全事件），但事件数量少（3件），影响有限；抖音热度总排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续较高；拥有35个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、 光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、化学工程与技术、机械工程、植物保护、生态学、管理科学与工程、药学等12个学科获评A+，学科实力全国顶尖，对优质生源吸引 力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与浙大优势学科高度匹配；安徽省2026年考生总数约45.1万，较2025年（ 约46.2万）小幅下降约2.4%，竞争略有缓和；省控线物理类本科批2025年461分较2024年465分略降，试卷难度可能略有增加；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，与安 徽省相邻，跨省报考地域偏好较强；该校在安徽省招生占比近年约2.2%–2.8%，属省外招生占比较高的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3049、2026年物理类扩招 约14%（43→49人）使竞争缓和、安徽省考生总数小幅下降约2.4%进一步减轻竞争压力，以及浙大顶尖学科实力与高热抖音关注度对优质生源的持续吸引，预计2026年最低录取位次 较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约3274名，区间2901–3647名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8252 → 5309 → 4097 → 2728 → 3049, showing a significant forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), peaking at 2728 in 2024 before slightly moving back to 3049 in 2025, with a fluctuation of about 321 places in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3049; the enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 42, 42, 43, 43, 43 respectively, and in 2026 it is planned to increase to 49, an expansion of about 14% compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years, which will slightly ease competition and may cause the ranking number to move back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for 6 consecutive years (2021–2026), belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents), but the number of incidents is small (3), with limited impact; Douyin popularity ranks 14th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention for applications; has 35 A- or above disciplines, including 12 A+ disciplines: Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Plant Protection, Ecology, Management Science and Engineering, and Pharmacy, with top national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Zhejiang University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates in Anhui Province for 2026 is about 451,000, a slight decrease of about 2.4% from 2025 (about 462,000), slightly easing competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 461 points, slightly lower than 465 points in 2024, possibly indicating a slight increase in exam difficulty; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, adjacent to Anhui Province, with strong cross-provincial application regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui Province in recent years is about 2.2%–2.8%, making it one of the provinces with a relatively high proportion of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3049, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment expansion of about 14% (43→49 people) easing competition, the slight decrease of about 2.4% in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province further reducing competitive pressure, and Zhejiang University's top disciplinary strength and high Douyin attention continuously attracting high-quality students, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3274, with a range of 2901–3647.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 135 → 138 → 244 → 159 → 156, with overall small fluctuations. In 2023, due to batch merger, there was a temporary shift to 244, but it quickly stabilized, remaining in the 156–159 range in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 156th. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 14, 14, 16, 16, and 15 students respectively. In 2026, the plan increases to 17 students, an expansion of about 13.3% compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years, which will slightly ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it has ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for six consecutive years, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative but with few incidents, having limited impact; Douyin popularity ranks 14th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 3.77 million, reflecting sustained high application attention. It has top-tier liberal arts disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A+), Journalism and Communication (A-), Law (A), Business Administration (A), and Applied Economics (A-), with national top-level academic strength, strongly attracting high-quality liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Journalism and Communication show divergent popularity (Law recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged). In 2026, the total number of examinees in Anhui Province is about 451,000 (estimated History Category about 138,000), a slight decrease of about 2.4% compared to 2025's 141,400 History Category examinees, slightly easing competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 477 points, up from 462 points in 2024, possibly indicating slightly lower exam difficulty. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, adjacent to Anhui Province, with a relatively strong cross-province application regional preference. The university's overall enrollment proportion in Anhui Province in recent years is about 2.2%–2.8%, making it one of the provinces with a higher proportion of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 156, the 2026 History Category expansion of about 13.3% (15→17 students) easing competition, the slight decrease of about 2.4% in the total number of History Category examinees in Anhui Province further reducing competitive pressure, and the sustained attraction of Zhejiang University's top liberal arts strength and high popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 163, with a range of 144–182.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 144–182, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Science Experimental Class and Law as reach options, and Tier 3 Humanities and Social Science Experimental Class as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 144), focus on reaching for Chu Kochen Honors College and Law. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 182), mainly apply for Tier 3 Humanities and Social Science Experimental Class to ensure admission.
